title: lippia formosa
intro: Lippia formosa, also known as Mexican oregano, is a perennial herb native to Mexico and Central America, belonging to the Verbenaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Lippia formosa include reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and alleviating digestive problems, making it a valuable natural remedy in traditional medicine. Lippia formosa can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in cooking and as a flavoring agent in various herbal preparations.
